falsification_conditions.condition: The price closes above the 200-day moving average by at least 3% within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: This would indicate a confirmed breakout from a potential bottom pattern, invalidating the 'HOLD' signal and suggesting a new uptrend phase.

falsification_conditions.condition: Volume spikes to 200% above the 30-day average on a single day within the 14-day window
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: Such a surge in volume would suggest strong market participation and potential exhaustion of the current pattern, contradicting the 'UNKNOWN' verdict.

falsification_conditions.condition: The pattern similarity to bottom_2024_aug drops below 60% within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A significant decrease in pattern similarity would invalidate the basis of the current analysis, proving the 'UNKNOWN' verdict incorrect.

doctrine: If you can't list what would prove your call wrong, you don't have a real call.
